configuration_store_id.description: Defines the ID of the configuration store (required)

content_type.description: Specifies the content type (e.g., application/json, text/plain)

etag.description: Represents the entity tag for concurrency control

key.description: Defines the unique key for the configuration setting (required)

label.description: Specifies the label for the configuration setting (optional)

locked.description: Indicates if the setting is locked (true/false)

tags.description: Defines metadata as key-value pairs for categorization

timeouts.description: Manages operation timeouts (e.g., create, read, update, delete)

type.description: Specifies the type of the configuration setting

value.description: Defines the value of the configuration setting

vault_key_reference.description: References a vault key for encryption purposes
